specific_mechanism: When attacked, plants emit volatile jasmonates that prime undamaged neighbors to upregulate defenses before attack; priming creates a population-level memory of recent threat without individual learning
llm_application: LLM defense-priming: when one agent in a population detects an adversarial prompt, broadcast a 'jasmonate' embedding update that pre-activates defense circuits in all other agents.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes botany phase-coherence mapping as proposed.
